heading: Contributions in name of another prohibited
label: 30122 Contributions in name of another prohibited
text: No person shall make a contribution in the name of another person or knowingly permit his name to be used to effect such a contribution, and no person shall knowingly accept a contribution made by one person in the name of another person.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Congress, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 441f of Title 2
